title: Integrative multi-omics analysis identifies stromal-immune crosstalk as a determinant of immunotherapy efficacy and establishes a prognostic signature in gastric cancer.
snippet: Immune checkpoint inhibitors like pembrolizumab exhibit variable efficacy in metastatic gastric cancer (GC). This study aimed to identify molecular drivers of pembrolizumab response, explore mechanisms of immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICIs) efficacy, and develop a prognostic signature.
